# deleteOrgPrincipal

<!-- @constructive-io/graphql-codegen - DO NOT EDIT -->

React Query mutation hook for deleteOrgPrincipal

## Usage

```typescript
const { mutate } = useDeleteOrgPrincipalMutation(); mutate({ input: { principalId: '<UUID>' } });
```

## Examples

### Use useDeleteOrgPrincipalMutation

```typescript
const { mutate, isLoading } = useDeleteOrgPrincipalMutation();
mutate({ input: { principalId: '<UUID>' } });
```
